[[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] '''Uther Kermen''' was placed in charge of the [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial fleet]] following the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]] by the [[Imperial Advisor/Legends|Imperial Advisors]]. Officially he followed the orders of the Imperial Advisors; however, in actuality Kermen decided much of what the fleet did.<ref name="TKC" />

Kermen commanded the [[Milagro campaign|defense]] of [[Milagro/Legends|Milagro]] in [[5 ABY/Legends|5 ABY]], fighting the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] in a months-long siege. Eventually, Kermen destroyed much of the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] with a [[Base Delta Zero/Legends|Base Delta Zero]] bombardment to deny its resources to the New Republic before being forced to abandon the system.<ref name="EGTW">''[[The Essential Guide to Warfare]]''</ref>

Eventually he butted heads with [[Moff/Legends|Moff]] [[Utoxx Prentioch]] and the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] when trying to secure the world [[Kaal/Legends|Kaal]] and its food resources. While he played along with the diplomats he never intended for anyone but the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Empire]] to gain control of the world. Kermen eventually betrayed his rival diplomats and was forced to [[Battle of Kaal|battle it out]] with Prentioch's flagship. The battle resulted in a stalemate, with Prentioch's flagship and Kermen's own ''[[Belligerent]]'' taking too much damage to continue to fight. The New Republic ended up securing the world.<ref name="TKC" />
